meaning: n.(尤指在使用两种或多种语言国度里的)操法语者,讲法语的(当地)人
examples: The nearest francophone university campus is that of the Université de Moncton in Edmundston.
This is what the important Francophone African poet Senghor does, as Gates says at the top of page 1901, the right hand-column.
Take Brussels. If Flanders breaks away from Belgium, could Brussels, officially bilingual but overwhelmingly Francophone, leave Flanders?
Early on Gandur gravitated to francophone Africa and became manager of Philbros' African oil trading operations.
Its main objective is to provide high quality African animation programmes for regional Anglophone and Francophone countries.
